authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: Yuba River Reach A (mouth to Highway 20 bridge)
reaches.fromDesc: Mouth (confluence with the Feather River, near Marysville)

reaches.name: Yuba River Reach B (Highway 20 bridge to Englebright Dam)

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40(b)(123) — Yuba River (Yuba and Nevada Cos.) from mouth to Englebright Dam
14 CCR §7.40 — footnote definition of hatchery trout/steelhead (**)
2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
Fishing the Lower Yuba? Stay Current on Do's and Don'ts — South Yuba River Citizens League (SYRCL)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, from the mouth to the Highway 20 bridge.
regulations.verbatimText: From mouth to the Highway 20 bridge. All year.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used, from the mouth to the Highway 20 bridge.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Combined limit of hatchery (adipose-fin-clipped) trout and/or hatchery steelhead; 2 fish daily, 4 fish in possession. From the mouth to the Highway 20 bridge.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily, 4 in possession, from the mouth to the Highway 20 bridge.
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Season spans the calendar-year boundary: open December 1 through August 31 of the following year; closed September 1 through November 30.

regulations.humanSummary: Open December 1 through August 31, from the Highway 20 bridge to Englebright Dam.
regulations.verbatimText: From Highway 20 bridge to Englebright Dam. Dec. 1 through Aug. 31.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used, from the Highway 20 bridge to Englebright Dam.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Combined limit of hatchery (adipose-fin-clipped) trout and/or hatchery steelhead; 2 fish daily, 4 fish in possession. From the Highway 20 bridge to Englebright Dam.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily, 4 in possession, from the Highway 20 bridge to Englebright Dam.
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Only hatchery trout or steelhead showing a healed adipose fin clip may be retained; wild (unclipped) trout or steelhead must be released immediately. The lower Yuba River has no trout/steelhead hatchery of its own, so most wild-run fish encountered must be released.

regulations.humanSummary: Wild (unclipped) trout and steelhead must be released immediately; only adipose-fin-clipped hatchery fish may be kept.
regulations.verbatimText: Hatchery trout or steelhead in anadromous waters are those showing a healed adipose fin clip (adipose fin is absent). Unless otherwise provided, all other trout and steelhead must be immediately released.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
